title: Irish Savoy Cabbage Grill
description: A hearty and flavorful dish that combines the earthy taste of savoy cabbage with the sweetness of irish ingredients.
instructions: Heat the grill to medium-high heat.
Remove tough outer leaves from the savoy cabbage head and separate into individual leaves.
Brush the grill with irish butter to prevent sticking.
Add grill seasoning to the leaves and toss to coat.
Grill the cabbage leaves for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender and slightly charred.
Drizzle with floral honey before serving.
